description: The 'Ndrina Anello is a 'ndrina (mafia clan) of the 'Ndrangheta based in Filadelfia, Calabria, Italy. Its activities include robberies, extortion, and drug trafficking. The clan has been involved in several operations by Italian authorities, including Operation Imponimento in 2020 which led to 75 arrests. It has interests in wind farm contracts and maintains alliances with other 'ndrine such as the Cracolici and Bonavota.

country_links.evidence_quote: Fiore Francesco Masdea, referente della cosca in Svizzera e accusato di associazione mafiosa
country_links.context: The organization has a representative in Switzerland who is accused of mafia association.
